title: United Community
address: 309 SE Osceola St Suite 106, Stuart, FL 34994
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Dikonfirmasi oleh bisnis ini 3 minggu yang lalu

ownerUpdates.text:
Reminder: Customer Appreciation Day is this Friday! 

To thank you for banking with us, we're hosting celebrations just for you. Check with your local branch for specific hours. We cannot wait to see you!

reviews.name: Tina Joyce
reviews.text: Formerly called "Seaside Bank," United Community continues to offer an exceptional degree of personal service. You will never hear "Press 1 for English" when you call. A real person always answers the phone.  You are greeted by name when you arrive, and wont have to wait in line and listen to other people on their phones. Their lobby has a splendid view of the St Lucie River. You conduct your business while seated in a quiet atmosphere reminiscent of a private bank.  Staff is friendly, and have excellent professional skills too. If they were still called "Seaside Bank," I would rate them 100. But they are a strong 99.  :)
reviews.textTranslated: Sebelumnya bernama "Seaside Bank," United Community terus menawarkan layanan pribadi yang luar biasa. Anda tidak akan pernah mendengar "Tekan 1 untuk Bahasa Inggris" saat menelepon. Selalu ada orang sungguhan yang menjawab telepon. Anda akan disambut dengan menyebut nama Anda saat tiba, dan tidak perlu mengantre dan mendengarkan orang lain berbicara di telepon. Lobi mereka memiliki pemandangan Sungai St. Lucie yang indah. Anda dapat melakukan urusan Anda sambil duduk dalam suasana tenang yang mengingatkan pada bank swasta. Stafnya ramah, dan juga memiliki keterampilan profesional yang sangat baik. Jika mereka masih bernama "Seaside Bank," saya akan memberi mereka nilai 100. Tetapi mereka layak mendapat nilai 99. :)
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Tina Joyce, for taking the time to write a review! We appreciate your feedback and are glad to have the opportunity to serve you!

reviews.name: Joseph Novak
reviews.text: Banker will not give me my bank account number. I do not know why. I cannot enroll in on-line banking without it as they insist on having my bank account number in the sign up. Since I DID open a bank account in the Stuart, FL bank, how do I get my bank number since it takes 7-10 days to get my plastic Debit card?
reviews.textTranslated: Pihak bank tidak mau memberikan nomor rekening bank saya. Saya tidak tahu mengapa. Saya tidak bisa mendaftar layanan perbankan online tanpa nomor rekening karena mereka bersikeras meminta nomor rekening bank saya saat pendaftaran. Karena saya MEMANG membuka rekening bank di bank Stuart, FL, bagaimana cara saya mendapatkan nomor rekening bank saya karena dibutuhkan waktu 7-10 hari untuk mendapatkan kartu debit plastik saya?
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Joseph Novak—We apologize for the negative experience. We have passed your feedback on to the Stuart Branch leadership team. You may also contact us at bankinfo@ucbi.com and we will have a team member reach out to you.

reviews.name: Hilda Bertram
reviews.text: Worked in the financial industry for over 20 years and United Community is a true hidden gem.  Wonderful service and varied products available.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya bekerja di industri keuangan selama lebih dari 20 tahun dan United Community adalah permata tersembunyi yang sesungguhnya. Layanan yang luar biasa dan beragam produk yang tersedia.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you, Hilda Bertram, for taking the time to write a review! We appreciate your feedback and are glad to have the opportunity to serve you!

reviews.name: Joann Wagoner
reviews.text: My adult daughter and I went to change our addresses.  It was our first visit to First Community Bank in the city to which we are moving.  The bank was downtown, but we pleased to find parking inside their lot. We were met with smiles and received quick service from Jesse Wilton who facilitated the address changes and other transactions.  Since they do not have branch banks, he explained where we would find ATMs out in the community. It was a pleasant and flawless experience.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya dan putri saya yang sudah dewasa pergi untuk mengubah alamat kami. Ini adalah kunjungan pertama kami ke First Community Bank di kota tempat kami akan pindah. Bank tersebut terletak di pusat kota, tetapi kami senang menemukan tempat parkir di dalam area parkir mereka. Kami disambut dengan senyuman dan menerima layanan cepat dari Jesse Wilton yang memfasilitasi perubahan alamat dan transaksi lainnya. Karena mereka tidak memiliki cabang bank, dia menjelaskan di mana kami dapat menemukan ATM di komunitas sekitar. Itu adalah pengalaman yang menyenangkan dan tanpa cela.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience, Joann Wagoner!
